summary: All veterans qualify for resident tuition rates at University of Alaska system institutions regardless of domicile.
eligibility: Must be a veteran of the U.S. Armed Forces enrolled at a University of Alaska institution.

summary: Veterans receive preference points in state government hiring. Disabled veterans receive additional preference.
eligibility: Must be a veteran with honorable discharge seeking Alaska state employment.
administering_agency: Alaska Division of Personnel and Labor Relations

summary: Free hunting and fishing licenses for Alaska resident veterans with 50% or greater service-connected disability.
eligibility: Must be an Alaska resident with 50% or greater VA-rated service-connected disability.
administering_agency: Alaska Department of Fish and Game

summary: Alaska offers discounted state land purchases to eligible veterans through periodic land sales.
eligibility: Must be an Alaska resident veteran with honorable discharge.

summary: Free camping and day-use passes at Alaska State Parks for disabled veterans.
eligibility: Must be an Alaska resident with a VA-rated service-connected disability.

summary: Provides free tuition, fees, and book allowance at Alabama state-supported colleges for dependents of disabled veterans, POWs, or those killed in action.
eligibility: Must be a dependent child or spouse of an Alabama veteran who is 100% disabled, was a POW, or was killed in action.

summary: Veterans receive 5-10 preference points on state civil service examinations for Alabama state government positions.
eligibility: Must be a veteran of the U.S. Armed Forces with an honorable discharge seeking Alabama state employment.

eligibility: Must be an Alabama resident with 100% P&T VA-rated service-connected disability.

summary: Veterans with 100% permanent and total service-connected disability are exempt from all state, county, and municipal property taxes on their primary residence.
eligibility: Must be an Alabama resident with 100% permanent and total VA-rated service-connected disability.

summary: Free special license plate for service-connected disabled veterans providing recognition and parking benefits.
eligibility: Must be an Alabama resident with a VA-rated service-connected disability.

summary: Tuition waivers at Arkansas state-supported colleges for dependents of veterans killed in action, MIA, POW, or 100% disabled.
eligibility: Must be a dependent of an Arkansas veteran who was killed in action, declared MIA/POW, or is 100% disabled.

summary: Veterans receive preference in Arkansas state government hiring. Disabled veterans receive enhanced preference.
eligibility: Must be a veteran with honorable discharge seeking Arkansas state employment.

summary: Military retirement pay is fully exempt from Arkansas state income tax.

summary: 100% disabled veterans are exempt from property taxes on their homestead. Surviving spouses may also qualify.

summary: South Dakota has no state income tax. All military retirement pay and VA benefits are tax-free.
eligibility: Applies to all South Dakota residents.
